properties.name: org.rd.fullstack.springbooteda.kafka.sandbox.clusters
properties.description: Number of nodes for the cluster.

properties.name: org.rd.fullstack.springbooteda.kafka.sandbox.cluster-partitions
properties.description: Number of partitions for the cluster.

properties.name: org.rd.fullstack.springbooteda.flink.sandbox.num-slots-per-task-manager
properties.description: Number of slots per task manager.

properties.name: org.rd.fullstack.springbooteda.hazelcast.sandbox.port-count
properties.description: The number of ports to use for Hazelcast.

properties.name: org.rd.fullstack.springbooteda.hazelcast.sandbox.port-auto-increment
properties.description: Whether to auto-increment the Hazelcast port.

properties.name: org.rd.fullstack.springbooteda.hazelcast.sandbox.join.multicast.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable multicast joining for Hazelcast.

properties.name: org.rd.fullstack.springbooteda.hazelcast.sandbox.join.tcp-ip.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable TCP/IP joining for Hazelcast.

properties.name: org.rd.fullstack.springbooteda.hazelcast.sandbox.join.tcp-ip.members
properties.description: The list of TCP/IP members for Hazelcast joining.

properties.name: org.rd.fullstack.springbooteda.hazelcast.sandbox.cp-subsystem.cp-member-count
properties.description: The number of CP members for the Hazelcast CP subsystem.

properties.name: org.rd.fullstack.springbooteda.hazelcast.sandbox.cp-subsystem.session-heartbeat-interval-seconds
properties.description: The interval (in seconds) for session heartbeats in the Hazelcast CP subsystem.

properties.name: org.rd.fullstack.springbooteda.hazelcast.sandbox.cp-subsystem.session-time-to-live-seconds
properties.description: The time (in seconds) after which an inactive session in the Hazelcast CP subsystem will be closed.
